layout_summary: A single centered vertical stack with 24pt rhythm and 24pt horizontal padding on a white surface: 96x96 logo, SpaceGrotesk-Bold 28 'Welcome back' heading in brandInk, a tighter 12pt group of two 52pt-high rounded bordered filled text fields (Email, Password/secure), a full-width 'Remember me' row with a trailing iOS switch, a full-width brandPrimary Sign In button (16 vertical padding, radius 12, white semibold 17 label), and a 13pt textSecondary 'Forgot password?' text link.

style.treatment: iOS switch, label leading, switch trailing

must_haves: Text fields use a rounded bordered filled treatment (OutlineInputBorder), never the Material underline default
Heading uses the SpaceGrotesk family at 28 with brandInk #1A1B4B
Sign In button is full-width, background #E11D48, corner radius 12, vertical padding 16, white semibold 17 label
Vertical rhythm is 24 between groups and 12 inside the field group; horizontal screen padding is 24
Remember me row keeps a switch treatment with the label before the switch
Forgot password is a plain 13pt text link in textSecondary #8A8BB3
